payload.label: side table
payload.long_description: Dark brown wooden two-tier side table with a rectangular top and lower shelf, holding a potted green plant and a small stack of magazines/papers; surface appears cluttered and the table is partially cut off at the crop edge (approx. 1.0 m from camera).
